title: Genie Space enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Create API instruction limits raised**: The create API now enforces the same limits as the UI for instruction creation. The maximum characters for query text has been raised from 20,000 to 40,000.
* **Answer now in Agent mode (Public Preview)**: Users can click **Answer now** to stop Agent mode reasoning and get an answer based on the existing context. See [Agent mode in Genie Agents](/aws/en/genie/agent-mode).
* **Request review on Agent mode (Public Preview) conversations**: Users can now request a review on Agent mode conversations. See  [Response feedback](/aws/en/genie/monitor#response-feedback).
* **Conversation history bug fix**: Fixed a bug where the conversation history list would only show the current conversation.
* **Genie Code citation links for monitoring**: When using **Analyze space usage**, Genie Code responses now include citations. Click a citation to open the relevant conversation directly in the Genie Code thread. See [Review usage and trends](/aws/en/genie/monitor#usage-trends).
